name: agentcorp
description: AgentCorp: a multi-agent software-delivery pipeline as Agent Skills — task orchestration, planning, implementation, multi-reviewer code review, and layered verification.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-agent software-delivery pipeline: orchestration, planning, implementation, review, and verification.
interface.longDescription: AgentCorp is a suite of specialized Agent Skills that run a full software-delivery pipeline. A Delivery Orchestrator classifies the task and routes each phase to the right role — planning, implementation, multiple independent code reviewers, and layered verification — with explicit gates and an assignment/receipt evidence trail between phases.
defaultPrompt: Use the delivery-orchestrator skill to deliver this task end to end
Run a code review with the code-review-lead skill
